collector: SystemdNative -> ManagerNative (manager Some iff active_state Some); pure classify_docker_state (State.Status verbatim; Health.Status as sub only when HEALTHCHECK declared; load/unit_file stay None — restart policy is config, not observed state); coarse ServiceStatus mapping unchanged
publish 5c: manager parameterized; pre-field wires (native state, no manager) default to systemd rather than dropping testimony

codex_review.invocation: codex exec gpt-5.5, read-only sandbox, approval=never, diff+design inlined (bwrap sandbox cannot read the repo here)
findings: 1 P1 ServiceRow missing serde(default): REFUTED with evidence — ServiceRow derives only Debug,Clone (batch.rs:155), never crosses serde; the wire type ServiceData carries serde(default)

2 P1 rolling-upgrade namespace corruption (old aggregator + new witness docker rows land as systemd): ACCEPTED as named deploy-ordering constraint in FEATURE_HISTORY — aggregator deploys first; standard canary order already satisfies it

3 P2 unwrap_or(systemd) masks future collector bugs: ACCEPTED as named transitional risk with retirement condition (tighten once fleet past this commit); the default is what makes new-aggregator+old-witness safe

4 P2 publish seam doesn't enforce per-manager NULL shape: REJECTED for tonight — verbatim-testimony posture; shape policing is a schema/CHECK policy choice, filed as candidate hardening in FEATURE_HISTORY, not decided overnight
5 P3 two docker inspects can quote a state/health pair that never coexisted: FIXED — single atomic inspect with {{if .State.Health}} guard (template verified against a live container)
6 P3 docker e2e never asserts the claim names docker: FIXED — claim must start 'docker reported', not contain 'systemd', subject box-1/docker:caddy-proxy
codex_review.net: 1 real capture-atomicity fix + 1 test hardening applied; 2 constraints named in the ledger; 1 refuted with evidence; 1 rejected as policy
